hero.headline: Your exports,
hero.sub: Automate your document workflow, eliminate all penalties from errors, and accelerate invoicing and financial reconciliation with Agora, the agentic operational platform for exporters.

problem.title: Eliminate the friction
problem.lede: The export process hasn't changed in the last 20 years. Critical information lives scattered across email, WhatsApp, Excel spreadsheets, and your ERP — costing you money and efficiency every day. There is a better solution.
problem.card1Body: The shipping instruction, BL corrections, packing lists, and certificates are rebuilt from scratch for each shipment — pulled from emails, WhatsApp messages, and Excel files. One wrong field triggers penalties, delays, demurrage, or cargo rejection.
problem.card2Title: Exceptions found when it's too late
problem.card2Body: A mismatched consignee, a wrong weight, a missing document — by the time these surface, the container is already at port. Most teams discover problems through a carrier rejection, not before.
problem.card2Cite: Losses from thousands to tens of thousands per incident
problem.card3Title: You don't own your institutional knowledge
problem.card3Body: Without a shared operational layer, when someone on your team leaves, their knowledge — and your processes — leave with them.
problem.card3Cite: Hours of coordination lost per shipment, per week

pillars.title: An intelligent operational layer
pillars.lede: Agora integrates with your systems to automate document capture and generation, cross-checking data and eliminating errors throughout the entire process.
pillars.p1Title: Information captured from where work happens
pillars.p1Body: Agora reads emails, WhatsApp messages, and documents to extract and organize shipment data automatically. Booking confirmations, SI changes, carrier updates — structured by operation, not scattered across inboxes.
pillars.p2Title: Errors flagged before they become costs
pillars.p2Body: Every document is cross-checked against source data automatically. Mismatched consignee, inconsistent weights, missing field — surfaced with full context before a carrier fee or a delayed dispatch.
pillars.p3Body: One layer that answers the questions your team asks every day: what's at risk, what's missing, who's responsible, what changed. Your team decides. Agora tracks.
pillars.vis1ContainerRef: Container MAEU-9182734 · Route San Antonio → Yangshan
pillars.vis2AlertBody: Sensor L-02 recorded +1.8°C for 47 min on 2026-01-08 03:14. Max threshold: −0.5°C. Compliant total: 13,847 min.
pillars.vis2OkBody: within the margin permitted by USDA protocol.

product.title: Coordination and automation
product.titleLine2: across every step of the process.
product.lede: Comex, finance and commercial — three integrated areas, one platform.
product.comexLede: One operational view of all your exports: active shipments, pending documents, open exceptions — clear ownership, no manual chasing.
product.feature1Body: SI, BL, and certificates in one flow
product.feature2Body: Errors caught before they cost money
product.feature3Body: Who has what, and what changed
product.finanzasLede: Agora connects your shipping documents to collections and reconciliation. It knows what to collect, when, and automatically matches it against payments received.
product.finanzas1Body: The system identifies which POs to collect and when, prioritizing by due date and client — without any manual work.
product.finanzas2Body: Matches payments received against registered POs and closes the case automatically. When it doesn't match, it identifies the cause so finance can act immediately.
product.finanzas3Body: Visibility of expected cash flow by period and client, with a clear split between confirmed and projected revenue.
product.comercialLede: Every shipment's data converted into negotiation arguments. OTIF, net effective price, and early warning signals — to negotiate from facts, not gut feel.
product.comercial1Body: % of shipments that met the agreed date and quantity. A hard argument to defend or raise prices when renewing contracts.
product.comercial2Body: Not the nominal FOB — the money that actually arrives after fees, BL amendments, and exchange rate differences.
product.comercial3Body: A single number per importer combining net price, OTIF, payment behavior, and volume trend.
product.shotDashboardAlt: Agora operations dashboard: priority queue of blocked documents and upcoming milestones for a real shipment
product.shotWorkflowAlt: Agora document workflow: shipment documents organized by dependencies, with approved, pending and blocked statuses

stats.eyebrow: The cost of getting it wrong
stats.stat1Label: of shipments have at least one document error
stats.stat1Src: Observed among Chilean fresh fruit and seafood exporters shipping 500–2,000 containers per season.
stats.stat2Src: Average cost when a container waits at port due to unresolved documentation. A directly preventable loss.
stats.stat3Src: SI, BL, packing list, phytosanitary certs, customs declaration, and more — assembled across email, WhatsApp, and Excel every time.

contact.title: Contact us to schedule
contact.sub: Tell us about your operation: volume, markets, and where you lose the most time. We'll respond within 24 hours with a concrete proposal.
contact.formSub: No commitment — we'll respond within one business day.
contact.formNote: Your information is confidential and never shared with third parties.

proof.statement: Built alongside exporters who ship every single week.
proof.clientDetail: Prunes, garlic and walnuts from Chile to 16+ markets

howItWorks.title: From the first call
howItWorks.step1Body: A 30-minute call to understand your current process, where errors happen, and what coordination costs you most.
howItWorks.step2Body: We show Agora running on your type of operation. No prior integration, no commitment, straight to the point.
howItWorks.step3Body: We start from your real documents and support you from day one with an expert team.

ctaBand.line: Get your next season in order

faq.title: What we get asked before starting
faq.q1: How does Agora integrate with my current systems?
faq.a1: Agora works on top of what you already use: email, spreadsheets, and your ERP. Nothing needs replacing — we start by capturing your real documents and data, and integration deepens as your operation requires.
faq.a2: The demo requires no prior integration. Onboarding starts from your real season documents, and your first shipments run on Agora within weeks, not months, with dedicated support.
faq.q3: What about the confidentiality of my documents?
faq.a3: Your documents and data live isolated per organization, encrypted, with a complete audit trail. They are never shared with third parties or between clients.
faq.q4: What language does the platform work in?
faq.a4: The platform is in Spanish and handles English export documents natively: BLs, invoices, certificates, and correspondence with carriers and clients.
faq.a5: Based on your season's shipment volume. After the first call we send you a concrete proposal — no fine print.

meta.title: Export document management software for exporters | Agora
meta.titleDefault: Agora — The operational platform for exporters
meta.description: Automate your export documents —shipping instructions, BLs, customs declarations, certificates—, catch errors before the carrier cut-off and speed up collections. Built for fruit and nut exporters. Book a demo.
meta.ogDescription: The platform that automates your export document workflow: fewer penalties, less demurrage, faster collections.

resources.title: Analysis for exporters
resources.articleTitle: Ley 21.719: the new regulation forcing Chilean agro-exporters to get their data in order
resources.articleHook: Chile's new data protection law takes effect December 1, 2026, with fines up to 20,000 UTM. What it means for exporters and packing plants — and where to start. (Article in Spanish.)

doc.title: Bill of lading
doc.subtitle: for web page transport or multimodal transport
doc.shipperValue: A visitor with an optimistic URL
doc.notifyValue: Agora — notified automatically, like every documentary exception in your operation.
doc.goodsLabel: Kind of packages; description of goods; marks and numbers; container No. / seal No.
doc.goodsLine1: 1 (one) web page · Marks: 404 · Container AGRA-4040-NF · Seal: intact
doc.goodsLine2: Cargo status: lost before shipment. No final version was ever issued.
doc.carrierNote: In a real export, one mistyped field on this document costs USD 100–150 in BL corrections — or USD 400+ per day in demurrage. Agora validates every field against source data before the carrier cut-off, so the error is caught here and not at the port.
doc.fixBody: a corrected version of your route, ready to validate.
doc.pageSub: Customs reviewed your request and issued the following document.
